scope: AQ4_0 tensor importance-score selection; Qwen discovery and Gemma lockbox transfer

numerical_contract.eligibility_before_guard: Every normalized denominator must be > 1e-30 before the guard is added.
numerical_contract.byte_denominator: Additional bytes must be a positive integer; no epsilon is added to this denominator.

interpretation: I_t is the primary score for ordinal_ud correlation.
G_t^* is the primary quantization-aware score for paired promoted/not-promoted Precision@K.
U_t^* is a display-only top-K heuristic; final allocation retains every (tensor, format) Pareto point and uses a one-format-per-tensor multiple-choice knapsack/integer program.
For C2, C3, and C5a deletion proxies, S_t is used for sensitivity/Precision@K and gain/byte utility is not applicable.
Raw negative g_t is retained as a candidate fit-failure diagnostic before G_t clipping.

methods.name: activation-second-moment weighted relative MSE
methods.A_t: A_C0(t,b) = Tr(Delta W_t C_{t,diag} Delta W_t^T)
methods.notes: This is the diagonal-C_t local linear-output reconstruction objective, not an independent diagonal GPTQ candidate.

methods.name: GPTQ-like block-covariance / Hessian reconstruction
methods.A_t: A_C1(t,b) = Tr(Delta W_t C_t Delta W_t^T)
methods.primary_variant: C1-block: blockdiag(C_t) with contiguous input-channel blocks of 128.
methods.overflow_rule: Use streaming block accumulation; never silently fall back to diagonal.
methods.deferred_variant: C1-GPTQ inverse-Hessian error-compensated reconstruction is deferred because it changes the candidate quantizer.
methods.non_candidate_variant: C1-diag is C0 information and is not an independent candidate.

methods.name: AWQ-like activation-only salience
methods.S_AWQ_tail: S_AWQ-tail(t) = sum_{j in top 1%} a_j / (sum_j a_j + epsilon)

methods.name: outlier and dynamic-range score
required_data: activation channel max and second moment

methods.name: single-tensor block-output perturbation
required_data: reference and single-tensor candidate block outputs
methods.A_t: A_C4(t,b) = (1/N_V) sum_s sum_{v in V_s} ||[F_l(H_{l,s}; W) - F_l(H_{l,s}; W_{t<-Q_b})]_v||_2^2
methods.L_t: L_C4(t,b) = A_C4(t,b) / ((1/N_V) sum_s sum_{v in V_s} ||[F_l(H_{l,s}; W)]_v||_2^2 + epsilon_energy)
methods.data_contract: D_block is a name-hash-preselected 16k-token subset of D_stats in four fixed shards; cache one model x one layer x one shard in BF16, cap host cache at 4 GiB and temporary disk at 8 GiB.

methods.name: gradient, Taylor, OBD, Fisher, and HAWQ

submethods.C5a_l1_deletion: A_|gw|(t) = E_s[sum_{i in t} |g_{s,i} w_i|], L_|gw|(t) = A_|gw|(t) / n_t
submethods.C5a_quantization_Taylor: A_Taylor-quant(t,b) = E_s[|<g_{s,t}, Delta W_t(b)>|], L_Taylor-quant(t,b) = A_Taylor-quant(t,b) / n_t
submethods.C5b_Fisher: A_Fisher(t,b) = 0.5 sum_{i in t} E[g_i^2] Delta w_i(b)^2, L_Fisher(t,b) = A_Fisher(t,b) / n_t

methods.fisher_contract: self-Fisher is primary: y ~ p_theta(.|x), then average squared grad log p_theta(y|x). Empirical Fisher on corpus next tokens is secondary and must not be conflated with self-Fisher.
methods.escalation_condition: Measure only if C0/C1/C4 all fail KL rho >= 0.30, C1/C4 systematically disagree with curvature suspected, or UD agreement opposes direct KL.

methods.name: single-tensor direct KL
methods.role: oracle / top-set reranker; not a production all-tensor winner
evaluation_contract: Use full-vocabulary streaming accumulation, valid-token masks, and report token mean KL, p99 KL, top-1 flip rate, and reference top-1 probability drop.
KL-core is a pre-label, pre-score 10-15% name-hash/family/layer/shape stratified sample; only it is used for inferential correlation.
KL-audit is the union of candidate top/bottom and disagreements; it is diagnostic only.
Report inverse-probability weighting if KL-core layer sampling rates differ.

methods.name: interaction-aware GAMMA / CoopQ methods
methods.role: deferred Phase 6 escalation; excluded from winner comparison
escalate_only_if: single-tensor C6 agrees with UD but multi-tensor mixed artifacts fail strongly
disagreement concentrates in Q/K/V, gate/up/down, or SSM in/out groups within a block
byte-matched multiple-choice allocation repeatedly misses the final-model optimum and pair interaction is suspected

teacher_label_contract.eligible_high_precision_escape_only: F16=4 and F32=5 are a separate secondary report, not the core quantized ordinal analysis.
teacher_label_contract.paired_binary_label: promoted = promotion_delta_ordinal > 0 using same-model, same-revision, same-conversion-cohort Q4_K_M; IQ4_XS to Q4_K is a lateral format change, not a primary ordinal promotion.
teacher_label_contract.unpaired_fallback: promoted_vs_4bit_floor = qtype_ud in {Q5_K, Q6_K, Q8_0}; exploratory ordinal report only and never an admission-gate replacement.

primary_statistics.within_family: For each model x canonical_family, correlate layer-direction I_t or S_t with ordinal_ud using Spearman rho and Kendall tau-b. Families with n < 4 or constant labels are undefined, reported as coverage, and never replaced by zero. The primary value is the equal-family arithmetic macro mean.
primary_statistics.family_level: Secondary: correlate family median score with family median ordinal/promotion rate.
primary_statistics.residualized_whole_model: Secondary: within each model x family, transform score and label to (midrank - 0.5)/n_family, concatenate, then calculate Spearman/Kendall.
primary_statistics.uncertainty: 10,000 layer-cluster bootstrap percentile CI; common layer-ID permutation across repeated families; BH correction for exploratory p-values.

statistical_admission_gates.paired_static_baseline: Qwen and Gemma each have same-cohort Q4_K_M and 100% paired coverage of eligible tensors.
statistical_admission_gates.ud_teacher_coverage: Each model: >=4 repeated families with n >= 4 and nonconstant labels; >=3 positive/negative mixed families.
statistical_admission_gates.cluster_bootstrap: 95% CI lower bound of primary rho > 0 on both models
statistical_admission_gates.family_direction_consistency: >=70% positive signs among nonconstant-label families; no n >= 16 major family with tau-b < -0.20
statistical_admission_gates.precision_at_k: K=positive count, prevalence p: Precision@K >= p + 0.25*(1-p) on both models
statistical_admission_gates.kl_rank_correlation: >= 0.30 on stratified subset on both models and not >0.05 worse than C0
statistical_admission_gates.binary_teacher_absence_status: HOLD: binary teacher incomplete; unpaired fallback cannot satisfy AUC or Precision@K gates.

final_policy_gates.artifact_integrity: missing/non-finite rows=0, target tensor coverage=100%, effective bpp <= target and absolute planned-vs-realized difference <=0.01 bpp
final_policy_gates.kl_improvement: paired prompt/conversation cluster-bootstrap 95% CI upper bound for candidate-mixed minus control-aq4 token mean KL <0
final_policy_gates.tail_flip_nonregression: p99 KL, mean/p99 relative-L2, and top-1 flip rate <= control-aq4
final_policy_gates.allocation_value: mean KL lower than all five family-stratified random controls and control-family
final_policy_gates.ppl_noninferiority: paired prompt-cluster bootstrap 95% CI upper bound of Delta_NLL_rel <=0.001

winner_rule: Only candidates passing every admission gate are finalists.
Choose the largest min(Qwen rho, Gemma rho).
Use paired layer-cluster bootstrap replicate differences, not overlap of separate CIs.
If worst-model rho paired 95% CI includes zero, tie-break by paired Kendall, ROC-AUC, Precision@K, then KL correlation.
If still tied, prefer no backward pass, smaller stored statistics, and lower measurement time.
Do not fit a UD-label linear combination or feature weights as a primary candidate.
If no candidate passes, declare NO-GO and retain C0 only as the temporary control.
